response.original_title: I Swallowed My Ex's Mafia Daddy Whole
response.overview: 19-year-old med student Lucas is drugged and betrayed by his boyfriend, then spends a night with a stranger—ruthless Mafia Don Arthur, his boyfriend's father. Obsessed with Lucas, Arthur slaughters thugs to reclaim him.
response.title: I Swallowed My Ex's Mafia Daddy Whole
